case_title: BANK OF AMERICA VS. JORGE A MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-07-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JORGE A SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-20-2019
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100046636) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100092676)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-07-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
